title: evidence-period input spec
description:
Input spec for ``evidence-period`` — the WINDOW projection (E5).

A time-window digest over the SAME collector, ending with the
unconcluded-campaigns list. ``since`` is required (a window has a start);
``until`` defaults to open-ended (up to now). ``tags`` optionally narrows the
window to matching scope tags; an empty ``tags`` is the whole-window view (a
period is inherently time-keyed, so no at-least-one-key rule applies here).

since.description: ISO-8601 window start: only records with ts >= since are projected.
since.title: Since

until.description: ISO-8601 window end (only records with ts <= until); null = open-ended (up to now).
until.title: Until

tags.description: Optional scope-tag slugs narrowing the window; empty = the whole window. Opaque caller data — core never interprets a tag's meaning.
tags.title: Tags

fleet.description: When True, run the identical per-namespace walk over every journaled experiment (the evidence-brief fleet posture); torn namespaces are skipped and counted.
fleet.title: Fleet
